title: Fox Totem - 3D
body:
🦊 Fox Totem 3D – Resource Pack

Replace the boring default Totem of Undying with a stylish 3D Fox Totem!
This custom pack gives your totem a whole new look — a cute, fox 

✨ Features

Works with Minecraft 1.16.5 → 1.21.10 (Minecraft may say that it’s incompatible, but it still works perfectly fine).

Fully 3D model.

Easy to install — no mods required.

📸 Preview
3D Fox Totem Screenshot
